methodology_note: Universe is the 30 non-ETF symbols present in the committed bar cache (backtest_harness/cache/*.json), not the full 103-symbol SP80_UNIVERSE production scans, because this session had no network access to refresh the cache. Breakout and Mean Reversion signals are generated point-in-time from that cache with no look-ahead (backtest_harness/satellite_signals.py). Insider Buying, Short Squeeze, and Earnings Momentum require live/historical fetches to hosts blocked by this session's egress policy and are reported as blocked_no_network.

config.entry_rule: next-open after real-time Breakout signal (fixed stop, no ATR trailing)
config.signal_source: backtest_harness/satellite_signals.py (offline replica of core.breakout_screener math over cached OHLCV bars)

config.entry_rule: next-open after real-time Mean Reversion signal (fixed stop, no ATR trailing)
config.signal_source: backtest_harness/satellite_signals.py (offline replica of core.meanrev_screener math over cached OHLCV bars)

insider.label: Insider Buying
insider.reason: needs FMP /stable/insider-trading historical data — financialmodelingprep.com is blocked by this session's network egress policy

squeeze.label: Short Squeeze
squeeze.reason: needs FMP /stable/short-interest historical data — financialmodelingprep.com is blocked by this session's network egress policy

earnings_momentum.label: Earnings Momentum
earnings_momentum.reason: needs yfinance historical earnings dates — query1.finance.yahoo.com is blocked by this session's network egress policy
